'''rafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ibid|ibid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ibid|ibid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rafate|rafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafatesher|rafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafatesherĂ«m|rafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafatero|rafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafateshĂ«|rafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafateshĂ«m|rafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafatero|gokirafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafateshĂ«|gokirafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafateshĂ«m|gokirafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafankerom|gorafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafankeshĂ«|gorafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafankeshĂ«m|gorafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafankeya|gorafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafaterom|rafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafatemu|rafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafateya|rafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafaterom|gokirafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafatemu|gokirafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafateya|gokirafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafafate|rafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafafatesher|rafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafafatesherĂ«m|rafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafafatero|rafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafafateshĂ«|rafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafafateshĂ«m|rafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafafatero|gokirafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafafateshĂ«|gokirafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafafateshĂ«m|gokirafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafafankerom|gorafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafafankeshĂ«|gorafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafafankeshĂ«m|gorafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafafankeya|gorafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafafaterom|rafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafafatemu|rafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafafateya|rafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafafaterom|gokirafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafafatemu|gokirafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafafateya|gokirafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠte|rĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠtesher|rĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠtero|rĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠfĂŠtero|gokirĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠterom|rĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠtemu|rĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠfĂŠteya|rĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠfĂŠterom|gokirĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠfĂŠteya|gokirĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafafte|rafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafaftesher|rafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafaftesherĂ«m|rafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafaftero|rafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafafteshĂ«|rafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafafteshĂ«m|rafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafaftero|gokirafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafafteshĂ«|gokirafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafafteshĂ«m|gokirafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafafnkerom|gorafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafafnkeshĂ«|gorafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafafnkeshĂ«m|gorafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafafnkeya|gorafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafafterom|rafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafaftemu|rafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafafteya|rafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafafterom|gokirafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafaftemu|gokirafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafafteya|gokirafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
